body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
The nightly pipeline now depends on the main branches of many packages. Maintaining version compatibility between all of these is very difficult. Specifically, Oceananigans and ClimaOcean follow a different release cycle to many of the other packages, and we tend to hit compatibility issues with them often. These require manual updates and cause the nightly runs to fail at initialization.

Here we remove the nightly CMIP run and the dependence on the main branches of those two packages in that pipeline. This incurs the risk of catching incompatibilities in the CMIP setup later, but CMIP is included in the weekly longruns so we expect this risk is mitigated.

## Content
- [x] remove Oceananigans, ClimaOcean main branches from nightly pipeline
- [x] remove CMIP run from nightly pipeline
- [x] remove coarse CMIP config file
- [x] update nightly pipeline description in README.md

In the Content, I have included

title: rm nightly CMIP run
